prestazioni: APR Stage 2+ ECU/TCU flash for the DAZA 2.5L TFSI (EA855 Evo) with upgraded turbocharger: Garrett GTX3582R Gen II (82mm compressor, 62mm turbine, 1.06 A/R housing) paired with APR’s high-flow downpipe (3.5" diameter, catless) and CTS Turbo 4" stainless steel turbo-back exhaust with resonated center section for reduced drone. Requires APR’s upgraded fuel pump (450 LPH) and dual Bosch 0246.200.044 injectors (1,300cc/min) to support 550-600whp on E85 blend (APR’s flex-fuel kit mandatory).

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (8Y-specific valving, 20-way adjustable compression/rebound, 40mm front/36mm rear spring rates) with H&R 25mm front/20mm rear anti-roll bars (adjustable end links) and Audi Sport 8Y RS3-specific polyurethane subframe bushings (034 Motorsport) to eliminate torque steer under hard launches. Front camber plates by 034 Motorsport (adjustable to -3.5°) paired with rear upper control arms (034 Motorsport, -2.5° camber).

APR’s carbon fiber driveshaft (1-piece, 100mm diameter) and OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2.5-way, 45% preload) for the 7-speed S tronic (DL501) transmission, paired with Sachs Performance dual-mass flywheel (clutch kit: Sachs Performance 3-disc ceramic, 800Nm torque capacity). Cooling upgrades include PWR radiator (all-aluminum, 40% increased capacity) and Setrab 50-row oil cooler (front-mount, 19-row core) with Earl’s -10AN lines and a Davies Craig EWP150 electric water pump for auxiliary cooling.
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (8Y-specific, carbon fiber fenders with 50mm flares, front bumper with integrated canards, and rear diffuser with dual 100mm exhaust cutouts) paired with a custom Vorsteiner V-FF107 carbon fiber front lip (aggressive 30mm overhang) and rear wing (dual-element, 1,200mm span, 3D-printed aluminum mounts). Full carbon fiber hood (Seibon, 15kg weight reduction) with integrated NACA ducts for brake cooling.

Rotiform LAS-R 19x9.5 ET35 (front) and 19x11 ET40 (rear) forged wheels (5x112 PCD, 50mm center bore) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/30/19 front, 295/30/19 rear) with custom TPMS sensors (Vibrant 19000). Brembo GT-R 6-piston front/4-piston rear big brake kit (400mm front rotors, 380mm rear, 2-piece floating design) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and Goodridge G-Stop braided stainless steel lines.

Full interior overhaul: Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber shell, FIA-approved 6-point harnesses) with Schroth Profi II 3" belts, MOMO Mod.78 carbon fiber steering wheel (350mm diameter, quick-release hub), and custom roll cage (Autopower 8-point bolt-in, TIG-welded 4130 chromoly, integrated harness bar). Audio system: Hertz MLK 70.3 3-way components (front stage) with JL Audio TW5 13.5" subwoofer (custom sealed enclosure in trunk) and Audison Voce 5.1K amplifier (1,200W RMS).
